1m-context.title: 1M Context
1m-context.description: Configures GPT-5.5 for the large local context profile.

web-search-live.title: Live Web Search
web-search-live.description: Requests live search instead of cached search behavior.

memories.title: Memories
memories.description: Enables the local memory switch when the current build exposes it.

goals.title: Goals
goals.description: Tracks a concrete thread objective until the work is complete.

codex_hooks.name: codex-hooks
codex_hooks.title: Hooks
codex_hooks.description: Runs local lifecycle hooks when the current build gates them.

external_migration.name: external-migration
external_migration.title: External Migration
external_migration.description: Imports external agent session state where supported.

prevent_idle_sleep.name: prevent-idle-sleep
prevent_idle_sleep.title: Prevent Idle Sleep
prevent_idle_sleep.description: Prevents idle sleep during active work on supported macOS setups.

terminal_resize_reflow.name: terminal-resize-reflow
terminal_resize_reflow.title: Terminal Resize Reflow
terminal_resize_reflow.description: Reflows terminal output more cleanly after width changes.

apps.title: Connectors
apps.description: Shows connector-backed tools and app integrations when available.

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.description: Lets installed plugin bundles contribute skills, tools, and integrations.

tool_suggest.name: tool-suggest
tool_suggest.title: Tool Suggest
tool_suggest.description: Surfaces relevant tools or connectors when a task appears to need them.

browser_use.name: browser-use
browser_use.title: Browser Use
browser_use.description: Lets agents inspect pages, click flows, and capture UI evidence.

computer_use.name: computer-use
computer_use.title: Computer Use
computer_use.description: Lets agents drive supported desktop surfaces under the normal permission model.

multi_agent.name: multi-agent
multi_agent.title: Multi-Agent
multi_agent.description: Lets a main agent delegate bounded work to helper agents.

personality.title: Personality
personality.description: Enables interaction-style controls exposed by the current build.

enable_request_compression.name: request-compression
enable_request_compression.title: Request Compression
enable_request_compression.description: Reduces payload size for larger and tool-heavy turns.

shell_snapshot.name: shell-snapshot
shell_snapshot.title: Shell Snapshot
shell_snapshot.description: Preserves more accurate terminal context across tool calls.

shell_tool.name: shell-tool
shell_tool.title: Shell Tool
shell_tool.description: Keeps shell execution available when gated by a feature flag.

unified_exec.name: unified-exec
unified_exec.title: Unified Exec
unified_exec.description: Uses the newer command-execution path for terminal sessions.

remote_control.name: remote-control
remote_control.title: Remote Control
remote_control.description: Exposes remote-control support when the installed Codex CLI build lists it.
